channel.title: sindresorhus/awesome-electron Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-electron Aug 9th, 2022
item.description:
Apps

Featured
  • Rosefinch - Store and run SQL queries.
  • Hyperstars39.4k - Terminal.
  • Nota - Pro writing app designed for local Markdown files.

    • Apps

    Other
  • Kapstars15.7k - Screen recorder with GIF support.
  • Beakerstars6.6k - Browser with peer-to-peer web protocols.
  • SpaceRadarstars1.2k - Interactive disk space and memory visualization.

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-electron Nov 28th, 2017
item.description:
Apps

Samples

  • Activity Monitor - Shows a doughnut chart of the CPU system, user, and idle activity time.
  • Hash - Shows the hash values of entered text using different algorithms.
  • Prices - Shows the current price of oil, gold, and silver using the Yahoo Finance API.

    • Documentation

  • Quick Start
  • Official docs

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-electron Apr 19th, 2016
item.description:
Apps

Featured
  • WebTorrentstars9k - Streaming torrent client.
  • Visual Studio Codestars137.8k - Cross-platform IDE.

    • Apps

    Other
  • Git-itstars4.1k - Teaches you Git and GitHub.
  • Caprinestars6.5k - Unofficial Facebook Messenger app.
  • Simplenotestars4.1k - Note keeper.
  • Abricotinestars2.5k - Markdown editor with inline preview.
  • Medisstars11k - Redis database management.
  • SmartMirrorstars2.7k - Voice controlled smart mirror.
  • Google Play Music Desktop Playerstars8.4k - Unofficial Google Play Music app.
  • Anselstars338 - Image organizer.
  • GitKraken - Git client.
  • 1Clipboard - Universal clipboard manager.
  • Postman - Create and send HTTP requests.

    • Components

  • chrome-tabsstars1.6k - Chrome like tabs.

    • Tools

    For Electron

  • electron-is-devstars405 - Check if Electron is running in development.
  • electron-localshortcutstars393 - Add keyboard shortcuts locally to a window.
  • electron-dlstars986 - Simplified file downloads.
  • electron-release-serverstars1.7k - Self-hosted release server with front-end & auto-updater support.
  • electron-downloadstars295 - Download the Electron release zip from GitHub.
  • ember-electronstars801 - Build, test, and package Ember apps.

    • Tools

    Using Electron

  • nativefierstars31.8k - Create an app of any website.
  • electron-pdfstars1.2k - Generate PDF from URL, HTML, or Markdown files on the command-line.

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-electron Feb 29th, 2016
